STP_GLOBAL_VALID_TEST.desc: Configure valid global STP settings in PVST mode with default parameters

eStr: Invalid STP mode - must be pvst or mst

STP_VLAN_VALID_TEST.desc: Configure valid VLAN STP parameters with priority and timers

STP_PORT_VALID_PVST_TEST.desc: Configure valid port parameters in PVST mode including portfast and guards

STP_MST_VALID_CONFIG_TEST.desc: Configure valid MST mode with region and revision

STP_MST_INVALID_IN_PVST_TEST.desc: Configure MST parameters while in PVST mode
eStr: Configuration allowed only in MST mode

STP_MST_INSTANCE_VALID_TEST.desc: Configure valid MST instance with VLAN mapping

STP_MST_INSTANCE_INVALID_VLAN_TEST.desc: Configure invalid VLAN mapping for MST instance
eStr: Invalid VLAN mapping for MST instance

STP_PORT_ROOTGUARD_MST_TEST.desc: Configure root guard in MST mode
eStr: Configuration not allowed in MST mode

STP_PORT_BPDUGUARD_VALID_TEST.desc: Configure valid BPDU guard settings with port disable

STP_MST_PORT_VALID_TEST.desc: Configure valid MST port settings with edge port and link type
